title: dendranthema quercifolium
intro: Dendranthema quercifolium, also known as the oak-leaved chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Dendranthema quercifolium is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish.
